markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Tony Ralston records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Scotland vs Morocco professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Scotland vs Morocco professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Tony Ralston: 1+ goals

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 19, 2026 10 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 84.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 84.99° on Jun 19, 2026 at 10pm EDT?

markets.rules_primary: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' BNBUSDRTI before 12:15 AM EDT on Jun 20, 2026 is at least the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' BNBUSDRTI before 12:00 AM EDT on June 20, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Not all cryptocurrency price data is the same. While checking a source like Google or Coinbase may help guide your decision, the price used to determine this market is based on CF Benchmarks' corresponding Real Time Index (RTI). At the last minute before expiration, 60 RTI prices are collected. The official and final value is the average of these prices, rounded to the nearest 2 decimal places.
markets.title: BNB price up in next 15 mins?

markets.rules_primary: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' BRTI before 12:15 AM EDT on Jun 20, 2026 is at least the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' BRTI before 12:00 AM EDT on June 20, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Not all cryptocurrency price data is the same. While checking a source like Google or Coinbase may help guide your decision, the price used to determine this market is based on CF Benchmarks' corresponding Real Time Index (RTI). At the last minute before expiration, 60 RTI prices are collected. The official and final value is the average of these prices, rounded to the nearest 2 decimal places.
markets.title: BTC price up in next 15 mins?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Zack Gelof records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Los Angeles A vs A's professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026 at 9:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Zack Gelof is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Zack Gelof starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Zack Gelof is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Zack Gelof is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Zack Gelof: 5+ hits + runs + RBIs?
